title: Baby Makeover
description: Gives the Tiny Takeover baby mobs a much needed makeover!
body:
[![Spark_server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6bcd4c7a1170269c7c6f9422f2bc574184de8942.jpeg)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3078)

![behold](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00ab595d2f3521960fd5901014ac4433521260ff.png)
***
Baby Makeover revamps the baby mobs from Mojang's Tiny Takeover update to be more in line with the other in-game mobs.

![baby_makeover_banner](https://i.imgur.com/CyIuDlC.png)

![addon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/478a94a0cfc1ccfdcd5594cb9fd0ea995deb1003.png)
***
This resource pack requires the mentioned mods marked below:

![Optifine or EMF/ETF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ad839ff3ba39226c2e38561fed87845e8314a22_0.webp)

![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7925f8af6bb75eb904febe9b92c84a6c902ba4d7.png)
***
- Gives all baby mobs the same eyes as their parent
- Tweaks baby armor models to look more appropriate
- Tweaks textures and models of most baby mobs

![andy_serkis_animal_farm](https://i.imgur.com/o782R5t.jpg)

![](https://i.imgur.com/6mb4QDE.png)
***
[![discord_link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f2d9f2c414441c5741f635153fc6820f884bfd9_0.webp)](discord.gg/kYYmAWQ)

![license](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eda2698ccdd602757b99afcb8431a6e875e5ea2f.png)
